criteria.reason: Refresh result and refresh-job payloads include reliability_state.
Reliability states and parser reason mappings cover retry, captcha, timeout, warnings, and failure paths.
Operator UI renders reliability counters and per-job details, and frontend build passes.
Telegram refresh summaries include reliability text for jobs requiring attention.
Lint and docs preserve read-only, no-provider-write, no-retry-execution boundaries.

commands_run: python3 -m py_compile src/services/operator_refresh_result.py src/services/telegram_dashboard.py src/api/operator_api.py src/worker.py

PYTHONPATH=src:. python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_refresh_result.py tests/test_telegram_dashboard_copy.py tests/test_operator_refresh_telegram_followup.py tests/test_worker_apify_settlement.py tests/test_operator_map_refresh.py
